summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 5→Jul 11 vs Jun 28→Jul 4* · Revenue -20% (1,050,193 vs 1,306,156 EGP) · Spend -19% · ROAS 5.52 (-0%).
   • CPC: 2.54 → 2.18 EGP (-14%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.28% → 1.06% (-17%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,098 → 1,129 EGP (+3%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 51%* of the move (hurt, -217,052 EGP)  ·  *CPC 41%* of the move (helped, +31,459 EGP)  ·  *AOV 8%* of the move (helped, +28,830 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -17%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-217,052 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -0%.
     Revenue -20% because spend -19%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *BBG PJS lebleb*, its CVR went 3.7%→0.86% on 3,551 EGP spend (~22% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 5→Jul 11 vs Jun 28→Jul 4* · Revenue +120% (113,976 vs 51,712 EGP) · Spend +111% · ROAS 3.87 (+4%).
   • CPC: 7.74 → 9.67 EGP (+25%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 2.05% → 1.77% (-14%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,398 → 2,111 EGP (+51%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 53%* of the move (helped, +38,502 EGP)  ·  *CPC 28%* of the move (hurt, -5,875 EGP)  ·  *CVR 19%* of the move (hurt, -17,992 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +51%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *38,502 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +4%.
     Revenue +120% because spend +111%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120254859180460011|Big personality catalogue   06-28>, its AOV went 2296.67 EGP→6334.0 EGP on 1,698 EGP spend (~21% of the swing).
